description: 编辑星河写作智慧集成到 ink-writer — 把起点金牌编辑在小红书/抖音发布的 288 份写作建议结构化为分类知识库 + 规则库 + 本地 RAG，作为硬约束融入全链路（context/writer/review/polish），黄金三章特别加强。数据源：/Users/cipher/Desktop/星河编辑/

userStories.title: 扫描数据源并生成原始清单
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a complete index of all 288 markdown files (path, title, platform, word_count, hash) to feed the downstream pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: New script scripts/editor-wisdom/01_scan.py reads /Users/cipher/Desktop/星河编辑/ recursively (two subdirs: 编辑星河/ and 编辑星河_抖音/)
Outputs data/editor-wisdom/raw_index.json with fields: path, filename, title, platform ('xhs'|'douyin'), word_count, file_hash
Processes all .md files; unreadable files logged to data/editor-wisdom/skipped.log with reason
Entry count in raw_index.json + skipped.log count equals total .md file count in source
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 去重与噪音过滤
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to filter out duplicates, login pages, and too-short content before further processing.
acceptanceCriteria: New script scripts/editor-wisdom/02_clean.py reads raw_index.json
Drops files where body char count < 50
Drops files whose filename contains 登录/手机号/验证码
Drops files with MinHash similarity > 0.9 against an already-kept file
Outputs data/editor-wisdom/clean_index.json and data/editor-wisdom/cleanup_report.md listing drop counts + sample dropped filenames
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 主题分类（10 个固定主题域）
userStories.description: As a developer, I want every cleaned file tagged with one or more of 10 fixed topic categories via LLM classification.
acceptanceCriteria: Fixed categories: opening, hook, golden_finger, character, pacing, highpoint, taboo, genre, ops, misc
New script scripts/editor-wisdom/03_classify.py uses Claude Haiku 4.5 via Anthropic SDK
Implements per-file-hash cache so re-runs skip unchanged files
Outputs data/editor-wisdom/classified.json where each entry has categories: string[] and summary: string
Produces data/editor-wisdom/classify_report.md with category distribution and 20 random samples for manual spot-check
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 生成人类可读的分类知识库
userStories.description: As a human reader, I want 10 readable markdown files organized by topic plus a top-level README index.
acceptanceCriteria: New script scripts/editor-wisdom/04_build_kb.py reads classified.json
Writes docs/editor-wisdom/{category}.md for each of 10 categories
Each file structured as: # 主题名 / ## 核心原则 (<=10 aggregated bullets) / ## 详细建议 (each with quote + source link)
Writes docs/editor-wisdom/README.md linking all 10 files with one-line description each
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 结构化规则抽取到 rules.json
userStories.description: As a developer, I want atomic machine-consumable rules extracted from the classified content.
acceptanceCriteria: New schema schemas/editor-rules.schema.json defining: id, category, rule, why, severity(hard|soft|info), applies_to(string[]), source_files(string[])
New script scripts/editor-wisdom/05_extract_rules.py uses Claude Sonnet 4.6 via Anthropic SDK with per-file-hash cache
Produces data/editor-wisdom/rules.json with at least 80 rules
Every rule.rule field is imperative Chinese and <= 120 characters
rules.json validates against schemas/editor-rules.schema.json via jsonschema in test
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 本地 RAG 向量索引与 retriever 模块
userStories.description: As a developer, I want semantic retrieval over the rules using a local embedding model (no paid API).
acceptanceCriteria: New script scripts/editor-wisdom/06_build_index.py uses sentence-transformers model BAAI/bge-small-zh-v1.5 locally (no external API calls)
Index persisted to data/editor-wisdom/vector_index/ (FAISS or chroma local files)
data/editor-wisdom/vector_index/ listed in .gitignore
New module ink_writer/editor_wisdom/retriever.py exposes retrieve(query: str, k: int = 5, category: str | None = None) -> list[Rule]
Unit test tests/editor_wisdom/test_retriever.py verifies category filter and k limit
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 配置文件与配置加载模块
userStories.description: As a user, I want a single yaml to toggle and tune the editor-wisdom module.
acceptanceCriteria: New file config/editor-wisdom.yaml with fields: enabled(bool), retrieval_top_k(int), hard_gate_threshold(float), golden_three_threshold(float), inject_into(context: bool, writer: bool, polish: bool)
Defaults: enabled=true, retrieval_top_k=5, hard_gate_threshold=0.75, golden_three_threshold=0.85, all inject_into flags true
New module ink_writer/editor_wisdom/config.py loads yaml into a typed dataclass
Unit test verifies yaml load, defaults, and type coercion
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 新增 editor-wisdom-checker agent
userStories.description: As a reviewer pipeline, I want a dedicated checker that scores chapters against retrieved editor rules.
acceptanceCriteria: New agent spec agents/ink-writer/editor-wisdom-checker.md mirroring golden-three-checker structure
New schema schemas/editor-check.schema.json defining output {score: 0-1, violations: [{rule_id, quote, severity, fix_suggestion}], summary}
New module ink_writer/editor_wisdom/checker.py orchestrates retrieval + LLM call + schema validation
Unit test mocks LLM response and asserts output passes schema validation
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 改造 context-agent 注入召回规则
userStories.description: As the writing pipeline, context-agent should attach top-K retrieved editor rules to the creation-exec-package.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify agents/ink-writer/context-agent.md to include an 编辑建议 section populated from retriever keyed on chapter outline + scene type
When config.enabled=false OR retrieval returns empty, output is identical to pre-change behavior (no 编辑建议 section emitted)
Integration test: given an opening-chapter outline, assert exec package contains at least one rule with category='opening'
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 改造 writer-agent 在 prompt 中注入硬约束
userStories.description: As the writing pipeline, writer-agent must see hard-severity rules as non-negotiable constraints during drafting.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify agents/ink-writer/writer-agent.md prompt to add a 硬约束 section listing retrieved rules grouped by severity (hard first, soft next, info omitted)
When chapter_no <= 3, additionally inject rules whose applies_to includes 'golden_three'
Integration test intercepts the LLM prompt and asserts it contains at least one hard-severity rule text when hard rules are retrieved
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 改造 polish-agent 按 violations 精准修复
userStories.description: As the repair pipeline, polish-agent must act on a violations list with precise per-violation fixes instead of generic polishing.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify agents/ink-writer/polish-agent.md to accept violations[] containing {rule, quote, fix_suggestion}
Polish output writes chapters/{n}/_patches.md containing a unified diff of changes for audit
Integration test: given 3 synthetic violations, assert the emitted diff touches the paragraphs containing at least 2 of the 3 quoted passages
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 硬门禁接入 ink-review 编排
userStories.description: As quality gate, scores below hard_gate_threshold must trigger polish + re-check loop, blocking the chapter if it still fails after 3 retries.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify ink-review orchestration to call editor-wisdom-checker, compare score to config.hard_gate_threshold
If score below threshold: invoke polish-agent with violations, then re-run checker; max 3 retries
After 3 failed retries, write chapters/{n}/blocked.md describing remaining violations and halt chapter emission (do NOT silently emit)
Log each attempt to logs/editor-wisdom/{chapter}.log
Integration test uses a checker mock that always returns low score and asserts: 3 polish attempts occurred, blocked.md exists, no final chapter file emitted
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 黄金三章特别加强
userStories.description: As the commercial-critical section, chapters 1-3 must use the stricter golden_three_threshold and a restricted rule scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify agents/ink-writer/golden-three-checker.md to additionally score against editor-wisdom rules where category in {opening, hook, golden_finger, character}
When chapter_no <= 3, use config.golden_three_threshold (default 0.85) instead of hard_gate_threshold
Produce reports/golden-three-editor-wisdom.md summarizing pass/fail per chapter
Integration test: same low-quality chapter text passes with is_golden_three=false but triggers polish loop when is_golden_three=true
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: CLI 管理命令 ink editor-wisdom
userStories.description: As a user, I want a CLI to rebuild the knowledge base, query rules, and view stats.
acceptanceCriteria: New subcommand group: ink editor-wisdom
ink editor-wisdom rebuild runs scripts 01..06 in order and exits non-zero on any step failure
ink editor-wisdom query '开篇 3 秒钩子' prints top-5 rules with id, category, severity, rule text
ink editor-wisdom stats prints: total rules, category distribution, indexed document count, last rebuild timestamp
--help text present with usage examples for each subcommand
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 集成文档与 AGENTS.md 沉淀
userStories.description: As a future maintainer, I need onboarding docs explaining the editor-wisdom architecture and how to extend it.
acceptanceCriteria: New docs/editor-wisdom-integration.md containing: mermaid architecture diagram, data flow, how to add a new rule, how to tune thresholds, FAQ
Update root CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md: add a 编辑智慧模块 section pointing to the new doc and listing top 3 gotchas
Update README.md: add a one-line 'Powered by 编辑星河 wisdom (local RAG)' attribution
No code changes required; CI green
Typecheck passes
